allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps agile-methodologies see interdependencies and feedback loops instead of treating sprint activity as isolated local work.
allies.source_quote: Agile’s need for continuous adaptation aligns directly with Systems Thinking.

allies.rationale_text: Experimentation gives agile-methodologies the test-everything discipline needed to turn iteration into real learning instead of opinion recycling.
allies.source_quote: testing every single possibility and comparing outcomes

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias turns agile-methodologies into ritualized hypothesis protection by using sprints to confirm a favored conclusion.
antagonists.source_quote: This disciplined approach minimizes the risk of confirmation bias.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Agile-methodologies conflicts with optimization-theory when sprint-local velocity targets degrade end-to-end system performance.
structured_tensions.source_quote: agile-methodologies vs optimization-theory: agile-methodologies conflicts with optimization-theory when sprint-local velocity targets degrade end-to-end system performance.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Agile-methodologies conflicts with premortem when cadence pressure skips explicit failure-mode rehearsal before release commitments.
structured_tensions.source_quote: agile-methodologies vs premortem: agile-methodologies conflicts with premortem when cadence pressure skips explicit failure-mode rehearsal before release commitments.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Agile-methodologies conflicts with confirmation-bias when hypothesis-driven sprints are used to confirm a mandated conclusion rather than genuinely test it.
structured_tensions.source_quote: agile-methodologies vs confirmation-bias: agile-methodologies conflicts with confirmation-bias when hypothesis-driven sprints are used to confirm a mandated conclusion rather than genuinely test it.

curation_notes.summary: The relation file keeps the clearest current-vocabulary surface from the raw source: systems and testing allies plus the explicit tension block.
donor_drops: Did not widen the ally set into broader design or collaboration neighbors because the current source-backed graph surface is already strong.
open_questions: Design-thinking is a source-real ally, but experimentation and systems-thinking were the cleaner current-vocabulary anchors.
